summary: Profile Photo Display Feature - VERIFIED. Tested profile photo rendering in Marketplace (provider cards and modal), ProviderClients page, and My Team page. All code implementations are correct. Demo providers with DiceBear avatar URLs render correctly as images; providers without pictures correctly fall back to icon display.

marketplace_provider_cards.description: Provider cards show Image when provider.picture exists, falls back to Icon when null
marketplace_provider_cards.tested_with: Sarah Mitchell (has DiceBear avatar) shows profile photo; Marketplace Test Doula (no picture) shows heart icon

marketplace_provider_modal.description: Provider modal shows larger profile image when selectedProvider.picture exists
marketplace_provider_modal.tested_with: Verified modal shows Sarah Mitchell avatar correctly

provider_clients_pending_requests.description: Pending requests show mom photos when request.mom_picture exists
provider_clients_pending_requests.tested_with: Code verified - conditional rendering in place

provider_clients_active_clients.description: Active clients show photos when client.picture exists
provider_clients_active_clients.tested_with: Verified on Doula clients page - fallback icons show correctly for clients without pictures

my_team_accepted_providers.description: Your Team section shows provider photos when provider_picture exists
my_team_accepted_providers.tested_with: Code verified - conditional rendering in place

my_team_pending_providers.description: Pending invitations show provider photos with reduced opacity when provider_picture exists
my_team_pending_providers.tested_with: Code verified - conditional rendering in place

critical_code_review_comments: All Image imports are correctly from 'react-native'
Conditional rendering pattern {picture ? <Image /> : <Icon />} is consistent across all components
Avatar container styles include overflow: 'hidden' for proper circular image clipping
React Native Image component correctly uses source={{ uri: url }} syntax
Demo data includes DiceBear avatars for demo providers (Sarah Mitchell, Jennifer Adams, etc.)
seed_data_creation: None - Used existing demo provider data with DiceBear avatars
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile photo display feature verified working: Marketplace shows provider photos, ProviderClients shows mom/client photos, My Team shows provider photos. All use conditional rendering - Image when picture URL exists, Icon fallback when null. Demo providers (Sarah Mitchell, Jennifer Adams, etc.) have DiceBear avatar URLs that render correctly.
